SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.storage

Class NBinary

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.storage.AbstractNField
com.nib.commons.storage.AbstractNElementary
com.nib.commons.storage.NBinary
All Implemented Interfaces:
IDataArea, Cloneable
public class NBinary extends AbstractNElementary
NBinary is a subclass of AbstractNElementary and represents a binary field in memory with specific behavior and customizations. It is designed to handle binary data and provides functionality for initialization, allocation, and value manipulation.

  • Nested Class Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • NBinary

      public NBinary(Memory memory, int offset, int length)
      Constructs an instance of NBinary with the specified memory, offset, and length.
      Parameters:
      memory - the memory reference where this binary field resides
      offset - the offset in memory where this binary field starts
      length - the size (in bytes) of this binary field

    • NBinary

      public NBinary(int length)
      Constructs an NBinary instance with the specified length. This constructor initializes the NBinary field without associating it with any specific memory or offset and sets its length.
      Parameters:
      length - the size (in bytes) of the NBinary field

      public NBinary initial(byte[] value)
      Sets the initial value for the binary field.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the current instance of NBinary for method chaining

      Allocates memory for the field using the specified length and updates the internal state of the object accordingly.

    • redefines

      public NBinary redefines(IDataArea dataArea)
      Description copied from class: AbstractNField
      Redefines the current field using the provided data area.

      Returns:

    • resetDefaultValue

      protected void resetDefaultValue()
      Description copied from class: AbstractNElementary
      Resets the field to its default value. Implementations of this method should define the specific logic required to restore the field to a predefined state or value. This method is typically invoked during memory allocation or field reinitialization processes.
      Specified by:
      resetDefaultValue in class AbstractNElementary

    • setValue

      public void setValue(byte[] value)
      Sets the value of the binary field with the specified byte array.
      Parameters:
      value - the byte array representing the value to be set

    • setValue

      public void setValue(byte[] value, int length)
      Sets the value of the binary field using the specified byte array and length.
      Parameters:
      value - the byte array representing the value to be set
      length - the maximum number of bytes to set from the byte array
